channel.title: Mr. Robot Season Alerts
channel.description: New season notifications for Mr. Robot from TVmaze metadata.

item.title: Season 4 — Premieres 2019-10-06
item.description: Premiere: 2019-10-06 | Finale: 2019-12-22 | Episodes: 13 | Network: USA Network

item.title: Season 1 — Premieres 2015-06-24
